nameMeanings.name: Bleythen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the Middle Welsh personal name Blethyn (Old Welsh Bledgint, from bleid ‘wolf’ + apparently the mutated form of cint ‘first’), or an Anglicized form of ap Blethyn ‘son of Blethyn’.

variants.name: Blevins
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Blethen with post-medieval, with excrescent -s.

en.lifeSummary: Bleythen Wrenbury was born in 1158, in Wrenbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son with Garneth Hulton. He died in his hometown.
